zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel於1255年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親John de Lovell II34歲，母親Maud Sydenham25歲。他於大約1270年與Isabel Bois在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年10月1日之前在英國奧可福爾可恩波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel于1255年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲John de Lovell II34岁，母亲Maud Sydenham25岁。他于大约1270年与Isabel Bois在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1310年10月1日之前在英国奧可福爾可恩波利。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel was born in 1255, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, John de Lovell II, was 34 and his mother, Maud Sydenham, was 25. He married Isabel Bois about 1270, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 1 October 1310, in Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel est né en 1255, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Lovell II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud Sydenham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Bois environ 1270, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1 octobre 1310, à Cornbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel 1255 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Lovell II 34 und seine Mutter Maud Sydenham 25. Er hat um 1270 in Oxfordshire, England Isabel Bois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1. Oktober 1310 in Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel è nato il nel 1255 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, John de Lovell II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud Sydenham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Bois circa 1270, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1 ottobre 1310, nel Cornbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lovell 1st Baron Lovelが1255年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Lovell IIは34歳，母Maud Sydenhamは25歳であった。約1270年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでIsabel Boisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年10月1日以前にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコルンブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel(이)가 1255년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Lovell II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Sydenham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Isabel Bois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 10월 1일 이전 영국 스퍼드실르 코른버이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel nasceu em 1255, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lovell II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud Sydenham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Bois aproximadamente 1270, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1 de outubro de 1310, em Cornbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel родился в 1255 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Lovell II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Sydenham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Bois около 1270 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1 октябрь 1310 г. в местности корнбури, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lovell 1st Baron Lovel nació en 1255, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lovell II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maud Sydenham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel Bois aproximadamente 1270, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 1 de octubre de 1310, en Cornbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
